posts.title: €30 to National TV

photos_needed.description: Selfie with Rav Vast and Greek village backdrop Astypalea (COVER)
Tips with handwritten thank you note - THE €30 PROOF - emotional highlight
Busking with guitar on Astypalea rooftop - white Greek houses
Dynamic live guitar performance with microphone - intense busking
Acropolis illuminated at night - Athens GGT journey
Greece's Got Talent performance on stage with Rav Vast and guitar

story_context.journey: Started with €30, busked for 5 months, discovered by Alexandra, got 4 ΝΑΙ on Greece's Got Talent
story_context.outcome: Became Rav Vast endorser after returning from Greece

posts.action_required: Grab screenshot from GGT YouTube video at moment of 4 yes votes
posts.caption:
This is why I believe in the long game.

5 months of €0 income.
Sleeping in hostels.
Playing for tips that barely covered dinner.

Then one person believed.

Alexandra, if you're reading this — you changed everything.

What's your "Alexandra moment"? The person who believed before anyone else?

posts.title: What does Lanzarote sound like?

photos_needed.description: KU100 binaural microphone close-up on Greek coast
Lanzarote Timanfaya volcanic landscape - Mars on Earth
Lanzarote volcanic crater dramatic texture

posts.caption:
Field recording isn't about pressing record.
It's about listening first.

Gear: Neumann KU100 binaural head
Location: Timanfaya, Lanzarote
What you hear: Exactly what I heard standing there.

Drop a location you want me to capture next.
Best suggestion gets featured in my next post.

posts.title: Kids and the Rav Vast

photos_needed.description: Kids gathered around Rav Vast during busking
photos_needed.PRIVACY_NOTE: MUST BLUR FACES - minors require consent per GDPR

alternative_photo.description: Child's drawing of Rav Vast and guitar - only hands visible, NO FACES
alternative_photo.note: PRIVACY SAFE - no face blur needed, shows impact without showing minors' faces

posts.caption:
This moment.

No followers. No algorithm. No strategy.
Just kids who'd never seen a Rav Vast,
gathered around to touch the sounds.

One asked: "Is it magic?"

I said: "Kind of, yeah."

These are the moments the metrics don't capture.
The ones that remind you why you started.

When did music last feel like magic for you?

posts.title: Denver: Street to Stage

photos_needed.description: Denver colorful street art parking structure with snow
Denver backstage with flight cases and purple lighting
Denver backstage equipment setup purple lighting
Live performance on stage with keyboards purple lighting
Denver night flight arrival city lights

posts.caption:
January 2023. Denver tour.

Two years earlier I was busking for dinner money.
Now I was playing for people who flew in to hear the same sounds.

The music didn't change.
The story did.

VareseNews wrote about it: "From street music on Lake Maggiore to Denver concerts."
(link in bio)

Where should the next tour stop?

posts.caption:
Some sunsets you photograph.
Others photograph you.

Morocco, 2022

future_posts.title: Greek Church Artistic Series

photos_needed.description: Silhouette playing guitar at blue hour - COVER
Portrait with Greek church bell tower
Sitting on church rooftop with red fabric
Dramatic red cape with Greek sea

future_posts.caption:
Between the white and the blue.

Astypalea taught me to slow down.
To find the shot in the silence.
To let the moment find me.

Sometimes the best photos happen
when you stop looking for them.
